title: Commercial Reporting Officer
description: Role Summary The reporting officer is responsible for ensuring the accurate collection, validation, analysis, and reporting of all commercial data across key businesses, including Top-Up, Star Pay, and Shops. The role supports strategic decision-making, performance monitoring, and continuous improvement through reliable MIS systems and actionable insights. Duties and Responsibilities 1. Data Collection & Management • Lead the systematic collection of data from all commercial projects, regional teams, and operational channels. • Ensure data integrity by maintaining structured, reliable, and well-organized databases. • Implement data validation checks to ensure accuracy, completeness, and consistency across all reporting sources. 2. Reporting & Business Analysis • Prepare and deliver high-quality daily, weekly, and monthly reports for the Head of Commercial and senior management. • Monitor and report KPIs, sales performance, and regional performance metrics. • Conduct detailed data analysis to identify trends, performance gaps, and growth opportunities. • Provide clear, actionable insights to support strategic and operational decision-making. 3. Performance Monitoring & KPI Tracking • Track and monitor targets, and operational KPIs across Top-Up, Star Pay, and Shops projects. • Ensure real-time visibility of performance against defined business objectives. • Highlight underperformance or risk areas and escalate to relevant stakeholders for timely corrective action. 4. Cross-Functional Coordination & Support • Collaborate closely with product owners, main office, and regional teams to ensure timely and accurate data flow. • Provide standardized reporting formats, dashboards, and templates to support operations. 5. Process Improvement & Automation • Continuously evaluate existing reporting processes and identify inefficiencies or gaps. • Recommend and implement improvements to enhance reporting accuracy, speed, and usability. • Drive automation initiatives to reduce manual reporting efforts and improve data reliability. • Support system enhancements and digital transformation of MIS processes where applicable. 6. Data Governance & Documentation • Maintain proper documentation of reporting structures, data sources, and KPI definitions. • Ensure consistency in reporting standards across all business units. • Support audit requirements by ensuring data traceability and historical record management. Job Requirements Education • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, Statistics, Data Science, or a related field • A Master’s degree or relevant certifications in Data Analysis, MIS, or Business Intelligence is an advantage Experience • Minimum 2–4 years of experience in reporting, MIS, data analysis, or a similar role • Experience in telecom, fintech, banking, or FMCG sectors is preferred • Proven experience in handling large datasets, reporting systems, and performance tracking Skills & Competencies • Strong analytical and critical thinking skills with the ability to interpret complex data • High attention to accuracy, detail, and data integrity • Ability to translate data into actionable insights for business decisions • Strong understanding of KPIs, performance tracking, and business metrics • Excellent problem-solving and process improvement skills • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, formulas, data analysis tools) • Experience with BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau) is highly preferred • Familiarity with databases, SQL, or data management systems is an advantage • Experience with ERP/CRM systems and reporting dashboards • Ability to design and maintain automated reports and dashboards Submission Guidelines Application Submission Guidelines Interested and qualified national candidates are invited to click the link below and fill in the form completely. submit their applications, including a cover letter and an updated CV , no later than 10 May, 2026 to the link provided below: Submission Form: ( https://forms.gle/WNnFXjsFKYVzEGdC6 ) Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: IT Officer NOC Engineer - Night Shift
description:
Role Summary
To serve as the frontline guardian of Setaragan Mutahed’s high-volume Airtime Top-Up infrastructure and StarPay EMI. This role ensures 24/7 availability of critical financial transactions and telecommunication links. You will monitor production systems, mitigate real-time payment failures, and ensure that overnight batch settlements and EMI reconciliations are processed without error, providing a seamless experience for thousands of agents and end-users.

Duties and Responsibilities
• Continuous Infrastructure & Transaction Monitoring: Proactively monitor core infrastructure, server health, and network links. Use approved tools to track the real-time flow of Top-Up transactions and StarPay EMI payments, identifying any latency or drops in success rates.
• L1 Incident Triage & FinTech Troubleshooting: Perform immediate first-level triage on system alarms. For payment failures or "timeout" errors, collect critical evidence (API logs, transaction IDs, screenshots) and execute approved runbooks to restore service.
• Critical Escalation Management: Act as the primary point of contact during the night shift. Escalate high-severity incidents (e.g., core database downtime, ISP link failure, or payment gateway outages) to on-call Tier-2 engineers or vendor support (MNOs/Banks) according to the strict Escalation Matrix.
• Rigorous Ticketing & Shift Handover: Document every incident in the Jira/Ticketing system with high precision. Provide a comprehensive Morning Handover Report detailing pending issues, vendor tickets, and critical status updates to the daytime operations team.
• Operational Health Checks: Conduct routine checks on server CPU/RAM, disk usage, and service statuses. Ensure all scheduled automated jobs and security backups are completed, reporting any exceptions immediately to prevent morning backlog.
• Overnight Batch & EMI Reconciliation: Verify the successful execution of overnight batch reconciliation jobs between StarPay and partner banks. Manually trigger or report failures in settlement processes to ensure financial data integrity for the next business day.
• Network & ISP Coordination: Support basic network troubleshooting (link down, packet loss) affecting agent connectivity. Coordinate directly with local ISPs and MNO partners (AWCC, Roshan, Etisalat, MTN, Salaam) to resolve connectivity issues affecting the Top-Up platform.
• Compliance & Security Adherence: Maintain absolute confidentiality of sensitive financial and customer data. Follow strict Access Control Procedures and Zero-Change Policy—do not perform unauthorized system changes or configuration updates during the shift.

Job Requirements
• Education: Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Software Engineering.
• Experience: 1–3 years of experience in a Network Operations Center (NOC), IT Support, or FinTech operations role. Fresh graduates with exceptional understanding of Linux/Networking and a high sense of responsibility will be considered.
• Shift Flexibility: Absolute willingness to work permanent night shifts and remain alert during quiet hours to handle sudden, time-critical emergencies.
Technical Skills
• Networking Foundations: Strong grasp of TCP/IP, DNS, VPNs, and troubleshooting tools (Ping, MTR, Traceroute, Telnet).
• Systems Knowledge: Familiarity with Windows/Linux environments, basic SQL queries (for transaction lookups), and monitoring dashboards (e.g., Zabbix, Grafana, or PRTG).
• FinTech Literacy: Understanding of API response codes (200, 404, 500) and the basic flow of a digital payment transaction.
• Documentation: High proficiency in professional English/Local language for writing technical incident logs and handover notes.
Soft Skills & Behavioral Competencies
• Crisis Management: Ability to remain calm and methodical when multiple systems trigger alarms simultaneously.
• Sense of Ownership: A "pro-active" rather than "reactive" mindset; taking responsibility for a ticket until it is resolved or officially handed over.
• Reliability: Strict punctuality and adherence to operational procedures, recognizing that StarPay’s reputation relies on 100% system uptime.
• Communication: Clear, concise communication skills to explain technical issues to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified national candidates are invited to click the link below and fill in the form completely. submit their applications, including a cover letter and an updated CV , no later than 05 May, 2026 to the link provided below:
Admission Link: ( https://forms.gle/jANFWERiLvYSTRwc7 )
Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Training Facilitator (Networking Trainer)
description:
About AWN
Following the Fourth World Conference on Women in Beijing, China, where Afghan women representing various organizations and United Nations agencies participated, the idea of establishing a unified platform for cooperation and coordination among Afghan women emerged. Inspired by global women’s movements and the need for collective action, these participants formally established the Afghan Women’s Network in 1995.
The Afghan Women’s Network (AWN) serves as a national platform that brings together women’s organizations and individual members to strengthen collaboration, promote shared learning, and support institutional development. It provides a structured space for organizations to enhance their capacities and contribute to community-based initiatives.
AWN maintains an active presence in multiple provinces, including Kabul, Herat, Balkh, Kandahar, Bamyan, Paktia, Nangarhar, Badakhshan and Kunduz, while also engaging members across other regions of Afghanistan. As an umbrella network, AWN works in coordination with its members to implement initiatives focused on community well-being, access to services, and capacity strengthening. The network comprises over 5,000 individual members and more than 150 member organizations.

Job Descriptions
Provide a clear understanding of networking concepts, definitions, and importance
Explain different types of networks (formal, informal, professional, community-based)
Introduce principles of effective communication within networks
Present relevant laws, policies, and regulations affecting women’s networks and civil society engagement
Train participants on interpersonal and professional communication skills
Teach strategies for building trust and maintaining relationships
Develop participants’ ability to communicate confidently in diverse settings
Develop participants’ ability to communicate confidently in diverse settings
Train participants on methods to attract new individual members and partner organizations
Provide tools for member engagement, retention, and participation
Support strategies for inclusive and diverse network expansion
Train participants on planning and conducting effective coordination meetings
Introduce meeting facilitation skills, agenda setting, and documentation
Strengthen follow-up and accountability mechanisms
Teach criteria and methods for investigating and analyzing networking needs
Guide participants in assessing the nature, scope, and effectiveness of networks
Introduce basic research tools (surveys, interviews, stakeholder mapping)
Train participants on effective communication through phone, email, and digital tools
Develop systems for information dissemination among network members
Promote clear, timely, and transparent communication practices
Train participants on how to engage with Network members, Civil society organizations, Government representatives (ministries, directors, advisors), Non-governmental organizations
Provide guidance on organizing and participating in meetings with key stakeholders
Teach strategies to establish and maintain strong working relationships with government and non-government organizations
Promote collaboration, mutual understanding, and long-term partnerships
Train participants on how to collect and analyze information to identify partnership opportunities
Support the development of alliances and coalitions for greater impact
Strengthen participants’ ability to advocate collectively for women’s rights and empowerment
Expected Outcomes
By the end of the training, participants will:
Understand key networking concepts and strategies
Communicate effectively within and outside their networks
Build and expand professional relationships
Organize and manage coordination meetings
Engage with stakeholders confidently
Develop partnerships, alliances, and coalitions to improve women’s lives

Job Requirements
Bachelor degree in social science preferably in Law, Islamic Studies, Business, Economics, Management or any other related field;
At least Three (3-5) years of relevant experience in delivering training on Networking and partnership development, Communication and interpersonal skills, organizational or capacity development, Advocacy or gender-based violence(GBV)
Experience working with Civil Society Organization (CSOs), Non-governmental organizations, (NGOs)Government institutions
Experience in women’s empowerment, gender equality, or community development programs is highly preferred
Excellent writing and communication and analytical skills;
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present complex information in a clear and concise manner;
Proficiency in drafting reports, press releases, and official correspondence;
Strong understanding of Networking concepts, types, strategies, Stakeholder engagement and relationship building, Coalition and alliance development,
Knowledge of laws, policies, and regulations affecting civil society and women’s networks
Familiarity with research methods, stakeholder mapping, and needs assessment
Ability to design training materials, tools, and methodologies
Ability to plan, organize, and manage training sessions effectively
Time management and ability to meet deadlines
Experience in organizing coordination meetings and workshops
Proficiency in spoken and written both English and local language/s is required.
Understanding and knowledge of basic computer applications such as MS Words, Excel and data base management;

Submission Guidelines
Applications received after the closing date will not be considered. · Please mention position title on the subject of email · Applications meeting the above requirement will be entertained only. · Only the short listed candidates will be notified. title: Data Management & Reporting Officer
description:
About OPHCD
OPHCD as an NGO is committed to providing quality services to the communities with an equitable manner. For this purpose, the organization has dedicated and expert staff in public health, Water Sanitation and Hygiene, education, community development, and volunteers who have been working in technical and managerial positions with national and international NGOs since more than one and half decade. OPHCD Management team (Technical and Operation Staffs) have both, in-depth theoretical knowledge and extensive experience in their fields.

Job Description
Job Summary
The organization implements multiple projects across different provinces of Afghanistan. Managing data effectively across these projects is necessary to ensure accountability, transparency, and strong program performance. According to this needs, the Data Management and Reporting Officer plays a key role in bringing together information from all project locations, ensuring that data is accurate, managed well, and translated into meaningful reports. The position also supports compliance with donor requirements and national regulations, including coordination with the Ministry of Finance.
Duties & Responsibilities
Information management
Lead and maintain data management systems across all projects.
Develop and improve tools, databases, and dashboards for tracking progress.
Ensure proper data storage, documentation, and protection in line with organizational and donor standards.
Data Collection and Quality Assurance
Coordinate with provincial teams and partners for timely data collection.
Review, validate, and clean incoming data.
Identify inconsistencies and follow up for corrections.
Conduct routine data quality checks and support improvements.
Data Analysis
Consolidate and analyze data from multiple projects.
Identify trends, gaps, and achievements.
Develop summaries, dashboards, and analytical reports for decision-making.
Donor Reporting
Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual donor reports.
Ensure compliance with donor requirements and deadlines.
Maintain reporting calendar and respond to donor feedback.
Partner Coordination and Capacity Building
Coordinate with implementing partners for consistent reporting.
Provide guidance, mentoring, and training on data management practices.
Compliance and Accountability
Ensure confidentiality and integrity of data.
Follow donor and organizational data protection policies.
Integrate feedback and complaints data into reporting.
Bi-annual reporting to Ministry of Economy
Support provincial project team to build their capacity for preparation of bi-annual technical and financial report submitted to the DoPH and DoEc at the province.
Follow up of these reports with the provincial project teams.
Uploading the approved reports along with all attachments in online reporting portal of the Ministry of Economy.
Preparation and submission of required documents.
Follow up on clearance processes and respond to queries.
Maintain organized records of submissions and approvals.

Job Requirements
Required qualification: Thos not meeting required qualification are not encouraged to apply
Master’s degree in Information Management, Statistics, Public Health, or related field
3–5 years of relevant experience in data management, reporting, or MEAL.
High level Knowledge of and evidence-based Experience of using SPSS, Power BI, DHIS2, Kobo Toolbox or ODK
Prefer qualification
Strong skills in MS Excel and data analysis tools is preferable
Experience with multi-province projects and donor-funded programs in Afghanistan preferred.
Fluency in English; proficiency in Dari and Pashto required.
Core Competencies
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
High attention to detail
Effective communication and coordination skills
Ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines
Professionalism and ability to work under pressure
High level of integrity and confidentiality
Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Timely submission of high-quality donor reports
Accuracy and completeness of data from provinces
Up-to-date dashboards and reporting systems
Timely Ministry of Finance clearance processes
Positive feedback from teams and partners

Submission Guideline
1.Interested candidates apply through the link Provided in Submission Email and Copy the Link and Pasted in the Browser.
2.OPHCD has zero tolerance policy on sexual exploitation, sexual harassment, and abuse (SEA).
3.By applying to this position, you agree to all OPHCD policies regarding Data Protection and Sharing and also PSEAH

title: Digital Sales Officer
description:
About Muslim English Language Institute
We and Our Inspiring Story!
About MELI
Thriving in the industry for twenty three years, our team consists of over five hundred employees who possess high professional expertise and strive to specialize in a single field; English language. Our vision is to enable a maximum number of people to speak the international language, the international way. With English being the lingua franca of today’s world, we take pride in specializing in teaching the language.
Today’s MELI
Across our 10 branches, we host tens of thousands of students! Within our 250 classrooms, MELI offers up to 240 new classes in a single week under the supervision of hundreds of English language specialists.

Job Description
JOB SUMMARY
The Digital Sales Officer plays a pivotal role in driving the growth of Muslim English Language Institute (MELI) through innovative digital marketing strategies. This position holder is responsible for developing and executing comprehensive digital sales plans, attracting online leads, and converting them into paying students.
RESPONSIBILITIES
• Lead Generation: Develop and implement effective digital marketing campaigns to attract potential students through various social media platforms, search engine optimization (SEO), and other online channels.
• Conversion Optimization: Create and optimize landing pages, sales funnels, and user experiences to maximize conversion rates and drive student enrollment.
• Customer Relationship Management (CRM): Utilize CRM tools to manage and nurture leads, track student progress, and provide exceptional customer service.
• Data Analysis: Analyze website traffic, conversion rates, and customer behavior to identify trends and optimize digital marketing strategies.
• Sales Team Coordination: Collaborate with the sales team to ensure a seamless transition of leads and provide necessary support for closing deals.
• Reporting and Analysis: Prepare regular reports on digital marketing performance, including key metrics, ROI, and recommendations for improvement.
• Stay Updated: Stay informed about the latest digital marketing trends, technologies, and best practices to maintain a competitive edge.
• Adherence to MELI policies and procedures to ensure a smooth and productive working experience.
• Undertake any other duties as assigned by the Marketing Manager.

Job Requirements
REQUIREMENTS
• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
• Proven experience in digital marketing, with a strong focus on lead generation and conversion optimization.
• Proficiency in social media marketing platforms (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.), SEO, and email marketing.
• Strong analytical skills and ability to interpret data to drive decision-making.
• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
• Possess qualities of humility, maturity, respectfulness, honesty, and integrity.
• Excellent written and spoken English skills.
• Have command of both National Languages (Dari & Pashto)

Duties and Responsibilities

· ایجاد اسناد در توسعه نودارها، طرح ها و مستندات برای شناسایی نیازمندی ها و راحل ها

· یکپارچه سازی اجزای نرم افزار به یک سیستم نرم افزاری کاملاً کاربردی
· ادغام بخش های مختلف نرم افزار برای ایجاد یک سیستم کامل و کارا
· طراحی برنامه های آزمایش و روش های تضمین کیفیت برای ارزیابی و اطمینان از عملکرد صحیح نرم افزار

· رعایت برنامه های پروژه و استاندارد های تکنالوژی
· تحلیل اطمینان از اپدیت بودن نرم افزار با ویژه گی های جدید
· حفظ مکاتبات و اسناد سازی
· ترتیب پلان های کاری و ارایۀ گزارش کاری به مدیر مستقیم و آمر ذیصلاح
· انجام سایر وظایف و مسئولیت های که بتأسی از طرزالعمل ها، دستورالعمل و هدایات مقام مافوق طبق لایحه و مقررات ارجاع میگردد

درجه تحصیلی

تجربه

مهارت ها و توانائی ها

· داشتن مهارت های مدیریتی
· فصاحت و بلاغت در گفتار
· آشنائی با برنامه های کمپیوتری Python, Django, FastAPI, .Net, React, Java+SpringBoot
· آشنائی به قوانین و مقررات بانکی
· توانائی در تحریر مکاتیب، پیشنهادات و گزارشات کاری
· فهم و درک مسئولیت کاری و تشخیص مشکلات در ساحۀ کاری
· حفظ محرمیت و ظیفوی
· آگاهی از وظایف و اهداف د افغانستان بانک
· توانایی طراحی و پیاده سازی برنامه های کاربردی که تعاملات کاربر را به خوبی مدیریت کند
· تسلط بر یکی یا چند زبان برنامه نویسی برای توسعۀ نرم افزار
· تسلط بر طراحی و مدیریت پایگاه های داده و استفاده از تکنالوژی های ORM برای ارتباط با پایگاه داده
· توانایی کار با فریم ورک های ویب برای توسعه و پیاده سازی برنامه های کاربردی ویب
· آشنایی با روش توسعه نرم افزار بر اساس تست، که شامل نوشتن تست های واحد قبل از کدنویسی است
· تسلط بر ابزار های مختلف مهندسی نرم افزار برای بهبود فرآیند های توسعه و تست
· قابلیت تهیه و نگهداری مستندات دقیق و کامل برای الزامات و مشخصات نرم افزار
صفات و ارزش های شخصی
صادق، دارای برخورد نیک، حامی احترام متقابل، مبتکر، با دسپلین، پابند به وظیفه و وقت، علاقمند به کار گروپی، همکار، مسئولیت پذیر، تصمیمگیر و مسلکی در بخش کاری

title: IT Manager
category: IT Billing, IT - Hardware, IT - Software, IT Support
description: Role Summary AurumPay is seeking an experienced and hands-on IT Manager to lead and manage our core technical infrastructure. As a licensed Electronic Money Institution (EMI), this role is critical in ensuring 99.99% uptime , security, and regulatory compliance of our digital wallet platform. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Oracle Solaris environments and Sophos security infrastructure , and will act as a bridge between development, security, and operations teams to ensure systems are secure, scalable, and audit-ready. Duties and Responsibilities Key Responsibilities 1. Server Infrastructure (Oracle Solaris & Enterprise Systems) Lead the installation, configuration, and hardening of Oracle Solaris servers Configure and manage Automated Installer (AI) for network-based provisioning Administer Oracle Solaris Zones (containers) to isolate application environments Monitor system performance, including kernel tuning and resource management (ZFS, DTrace) Implement backup strategies, including ZFS snapshots and disaster recovery procedures 2. Network Security (Sophos Firewall & Perimeter Defense) Deploy, configure, and maintain Sophos Firewall (XG/XGS series) Implement firewall policies, VLAN segmentation, and access control lists (ACLs) Manage secure connectivity through Site-to-Site (IPsec/SSL) and SSL VPN Monitor and optimize threat protection tools, including MDR, IPS, Web Filtering, and Application Control 3. EMI & Fintech Compliance · Ensure all configurations align with Central Bank (DAB) regulations for EMI operations. · Maintain logs for all access to financial systems; prepare for internal and external audits. · Lead IT audit and change management processes – no unapproved changes to firewall, Solaris zones, or payment integrations. · Manage Business Continuity (BCP) and Disaster Recovery (DR) drills with measurable targets: RTO < 1 hour, RPO < 15 minutes for transaction systems. 4. IT Operations & Management Manage Windows/Linux servers where the application stack interfaces with Solaris. Oversee vendor management for internet links and hardware procurement. Lead and support the internal IT helpdesk team 5. Budget & Vendor Management (Critical addition) · Prepare and manage the annual IT budget, including hardware, software licenses (Oracle, Sophos), and support contracts. · Negotiate with vendors for internet links, data center services, and hardware procurement. Job Requirements Required Technical Skills & Competencies Expert-level experience with Oracle Solaris, including installation, Zones, ZFS, and networking Proficiency in Linux (RedHat/CentOS) and Windows Server environments Strong expertise in Sophos Firewall (XG/XGS), including policy configuration, NAT, VPN, and high availability Solid understanding of networking concepts such as VLANs, TCP/IP, and routing protocols (BGP/OSPF) Familiarity with fintech systems and standards such as ISO 8583, 3D Secure, PCI DSS, and high-availability architectures Experience with virtualization technologies such as Solaris Zones, VMware vSphere, or similar platforms Experience & Qualifications Minimum 5+ years of experience in IT infrastructure management At least 3 years of hands-on experience with Oracle Solaris and Sophos security solutions Prior experience in fintech, banking, or EMI environments is required Preferred Certifications: Oracle Certified Professional (OCP) – Solaris Sophos Certified Architect or Engineer CCNA, ITIL v4 Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field Personal Attributes High level of integrity and ability to handle sensitive financial systems Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work under pressure Detail-oriented with a strong focus on documentation and audit readiness Submission Guidelines How to Apply: Interested and qualified candidates are invited to submit their CV and cover letter (in PDF format) to jobs@aurumaf.com Please mention the position title “IT Manager” in the subject line of your email. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

description:
About CTG
CTG was established in 2006, almost 20 years ago, in Afghanistan. We currently operate in 35 countries and have approximately 11,500 staff members committed to good!
But do you know who we are? And what do we do?
We provide tailored Human Resources and Staffing Solutions that support critical global initiatives across Humanitarian and Development sectors, and are now strategically foraying into new industries, including Construction, Energy, and IT, with a focus on high-risk regions.
Here’s a list of services we offer:
•Staffing solutions and HR management services
•Monitoring and evaluation
•Fleet management and logistics
•Facilities management
•Sustainability and Communications Advisory
•Election monitoring and observation
•IT professional services
•Medical assistance
Visit www.ctg.org to find out more.

Job Description
Background : The Afghanistan Food and Drug Authority (AFDA), as the national regulatory authority, is responsible for ensuring the quality, safety, and efficacy of medicines, medical devices, healthcare products, and food. Despite important progress, Afghanistan’s regulatory system continues to face challenges, including limited technical capacity, high dependence on imported products, inconsistent adherence to quality standards, and evolving systems for product registration, inspections, licensing, and market surveillance. Strengthening AFDA’s regulatory functions in alignment with WHO norms and standards is essential to protect public health, prevent substandard and falsified products, and support the country’s broader goals for health system resilience and universal health coverage.
To advance these priorities, AFDA is implementing regulatory reforms guided by the WHO Global Benchmarking Tool (GBT), which provides a structured framework for assessing regulatory maturity and developing Institutional Development Plans (IDPs). To accelerate progress, specialized technical support is required to strengthen GBT implementation, enhance capacity in GMP, regulatory workflows, medicines registration, regulatory information systems, and AMR-related oversight. The engagement of an international consultant will provide targeted expertise, hands-on mentoring, and capacity-building to AFDA staff, supporting the development of sustainable, evidence-based, and internationally aligned regulatory systems that effectively safeguard public health in Afghanistan.

Job Requirements
1. Purpose of the Consultancy:
The purpose of this post is to design, develop, and maintain high-quality databases to meet AFDA requirements. The incumbent ensures seamless integration between backend and frontend systems, delivers secure and maintainable code, and contributes to the overall efficiency and scalability of AFDA’s digital services.
2. Output:
The outputs of this post include scalable and secure web applications that provide reliable backend services and responsive frontend interfaces. The role ensures enhanced user experience, efficient database integration, and high application performance. By maintaining best practices and documentation, it supports future scalability, sustainable software maintenance, and the successful delivery of digital services.
3. Tasks:
· Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using Django (backend) and React + TypeScript (frontend).
· Build and optimize RESTful APIs and integrate with PostgreSQL databases.
· Implement clean, maintainable, and secure code following best practices.
· Collaborate with designers, product managers, and other developers to deliver high-quality features.
· Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance and write and maintain technical documentation
Deliverables:
Deliverable 1: Fully functional databases and Clean, maintainable, and secure code adhering to best practices.
Deliverable 2: Technical documentation covering system architecture, workflows, and APIs.
Deliverable 3: Optimized application performance, troubleshooting, and debugging reports.
Qualifications and experience:
Education :
Essential: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field. A Master’s degree is preferred and may be considered an asset.
Experience :
Essential: A minimum of 2 years of progressively responsible experience in database development, design, and Django, react.nexjs at a specialist level.
Skills / Technical skills and knowledge:
• Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
• High sense of responsibility and strong organizational skills with ability to work under pressure.
• Advanced computer literacy (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.)
Languages :
• Excellent knowledge of English
• Good Local Languages (Pashto and Dari)
Additional Information
WHO has zero tolerance for sexual misconduct, inaction against it and any form of retaliation against victims/survivors or bystanders who disclose, report, or participate in an investigation. Parallel to technical competence, recruitment, selection and hiring decisions will give due emphasis to assessing candidates value congruence, thorough background checks and reference check processes. This will ensure children and vulnerable adults are safeguarded from abusers and that abusers are prevented from joining WHO Afghanistan office. Please report any concerning information regarding sexual exploitation and abuse by WHO workforce and partners to WHO office of Internal Oversight services at investigations@who.int
WHO is a smoke free environment.

title: Full-Stack Software Developer
description:
Role Summary
STATECORPS is looking for a skilled Full-Stack Developer to design, develop, and maintain scalable applications/software. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience with modern front-end frameworks, back-end technologies, APIs and system management.

Duties and Responsibilities
A Full-Stack Software Developer designs, builds, and maintains end-to-end web applications, ensuring performance, security, and scalability.
1. Front-End Development
Build responsive, accessible UIs using modern frameworks (React, Angular, Vue.js).
Translate wireframes into interactive user experiences.
Ensure cross-browser compatibility and performance optimization.
2. Back-End & API Development
Design and maintain RESTful and GraphQL APIs.
Implement server-side logic using frameworks (Laravel, Django, Express, Spring Boot).
Integrate third-party services and external APIs.
3. Database Management
Design and optimize relational and NoSQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
Ensure data integrity, indexing, and efficient querying.
Manage migrations, backups, and recovery processes.
4. Performance Optimization
Improve system performance via caching, load balancing, and efficient queries.
Optimize front-end assets and backend processes.
Implement scalable architectures and CDN usage.
5. Security Implementation
Apply authentication/authorization (OAuth, JWT, SSO).
Follow secure coding standards (OWASP practices).
Enforce encryption, validation, and regular security updates.
6. Testing & Quality Assurance
Develop unit, integration, and end-to-end tests.
Debug and resolve issues across environments.
Integrate automated testing into CI/CD pipelines.
7. DevOps & Deployment
Build CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins).
Use containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).
Deploy applications on cloud platforms and web servers.
8. Code Management & Documentation
Use Git with structured workflows for version control.
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.
Maintain API and system documentation.
9. Monitoring & Maintenance
Monitor systems using tools like Prometheus or Grafana.
Handle production issues, updates, and system health checks.
Perform routine maintenance and optimizations.
10. Collaboration & Agile Practices
Work with cross-functional teams (design, QA, product, DevOps).
Translate business requirements into technical solutions.
Participate in Agile processes and mentor team members.
11. System Architecture
Design scalable and fault-tolerant systems.
Evaluate and select appropriate technologies.
Communicate architectural decisions and trade-offs.

Job Requirements
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field
Experience:
5–7 years of relevant experience.
Required Knowledge:
CMS Development: Ability to build and manage websites using platforms such as WordPress, Joomla, or similar systems.
Back-End & API Development: Knowledge of developing and documenting APIs using modern frameworks and tools (e.g., Laravel, Django, Express, Postman, Swagger).
Databases & Data Management: Understanding of relational and NoSQL databases, data storage, and retrieval.
Deployment & Infrastructure: Knowledge of containerization, orchestration, and deployment (Docker, Kubernetes).
Server Management: Understanding of configuring and maintaining web servers (Nginx, Apache, or equivalents).
Required Skills:
Core Web Technologies: Proficiency in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Front-End Frameworks: Experience with React, Angular, or Vue.js.
Back-End Development: Hands-on experience with at least one modern framework (Laravel, Django, Flask, Node.js/Express, or Spring Boot).
Databases: Practical experience with SQL and NoSQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis).
API Integration: Ability to design and consume RESTful or GraphQL APIs.
Version Control: Proficiency in Git and collaborative workflows.
CMS Platforms: Familiarity with WordPress, Joomla, or Drupal.
Web Security: Understanding of secure coding practices and common vulnerabilities.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified applicants are highly encouraged to apply by clicking on the “Apply” pop-up button displayed while viewing the job vacancy.
NOTE: Only short-listed candidates will be invited for written test/interview.

title: IT Technician – ISP Network & Field Operations
description:
Role Summary
The IT Technician is responsible for managing the installation and troubleshooting of Wireless, Microwave, and VSAT links. The role includes resolving issues related to LAN network devices and addressing computer-related problems for customers through in-person support, phone consultations, or remote assistance. Additionally, the IT Technician provides technical support regarding computer operating systems, software applications, email configuration, installation processes, printing solutions, and the maintenance of customer LAN networks.

Duties and Responsibilities
Perform installation, activation, and troubleshooting of wireless links in accordance with company guidelines.
Execute the installation, activation, and troubleshooting of microwave links following established protocols.
Conduct installation, activation, and troubleshooting of VSAT links while adhering to company policies.
Install and configure LAN network devices to meet customer requirements effectively.
Troubleshoot LAN network devices and provide the best solution in case of second option availability.
Conduct surveys for network projects, arrange requirements, and implement solutions as needed.
DVR camera wiring, installation, and configuring based on the requirement.
UAT wireless base stations maintenance and resolving 1st level base station issues (in cooperation with Head Office)
Installing Wire and Wireless equipment at UA wireless base stations and ensuring 100% functionality upon completion.
Integrating technical solutions successfully done on-site and sharing it with other team members for future use.
Detailed daily and weekly reports to under-assigned manager.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree/Diploma in Computer Science and/ or relevant field.
A minimum of 3 years of experience in network installation and troubleshooting or a relevant field.
Relevant certifications (e.g., Cisco CCNA, MCITP, or equivalent) will be considered an advantage.
Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to communicate technical information effectively.
Full understanding and speaking of Dari, Pashto, and English.
Ability to ride a motorcycle and be comfortable using it when required for work-related tasks
Competencies (in order of importance)
Dependability — The job requires being reliable, responsible, dependable, and fulfilling obligations.
Attention to Detail — The job requires being careful about detail and thorough in completing work tasks.
Cooperation — The job requires being pleasant with others on the job and displaying a good-natured, cooperative attitude.
Analytical Thinking — The job requires analyzing information and using logic to address work-related issues and problems.
Integrity — The job requires being honest and ethical.

title: Sourcing & Quotation Analyst
category: Procurement and logistics, Information Technology, Business Development, Sales, Supply Chain Management
description: Role Summary We are hiring a Sourcing & Quotation Analyst to join our remote team. This is a night shift role. Your shift starts at 5:00 PM Kabul time and runs for 8 hours, aligned with international business hours. Your day will revolve around three things: finding the right opportunities, sourcing the right items from the right vendors, and building clean quotations that win. You will spend most of your shift on calls and emails with international vendors, so strong English and confidence on the phone are non-negotiable. This role is for someone serious. Someone who wants to grow, works hard without being chased, and takes pride in getting the details right. If you are looking for a relaxed 9 to 5, this is not for you. If you want to build a real career and you are willing to put in the work, we want to talk to you. Duties and Responsibilities Opportunity Research Search online portals and platforms for new tenders, RFQs, and product opportunities. Read the requirements carefully and understand exactly what is being asked for. Shortlist the opportunities that fit and flag them to management. Item Sourcing Identify the correct manufacturers and authorized distributors for each item. Verify part numbers, specifications, and compliance requirements before reaching out. Find backup vendors for every key item so we are never stuck with a single source. Vendor Communication Call and email vendors during your shift to request quotes, confirm stock, lead times, and shipping terms. Ask sharp follow-up questions when a quote is incomplete or unclear. Follow up consistently until you have everything you need. No half-finished work. Quotation Preparation Organize vendor pricing in Excel or Google Sheets and compare properly. Build professional quotations using company templates. Triple check every number, SKU, quantity, and date before anything goes out. Coordination and Records Keep clean records of all vendor communication, quotes, and follow-ups. Update internal trackers and CRM tools daily. Work closely with management on final pricing and submission strategy. Never miss a deadline. Discipline and Work Ethic Log in on time. Every shift. Respond quickly on email, WhatsApp, and internal tools during your hours. Keep a professional tone in every vendor interaction. Own your work. No excuses, no shortcuts. Job Requirements Must-Have Fluent English. Spoken and written. You must be able to hold a clear, confident conversation on the phone with international vendors. This is not negotiable. Strong IT background. Comfortable with advanced Google search, Excel or Google Sheets (formulas, filters, sorting), email tools, cloud storage, and basic CRM systems. Sharp critical thinking. You can read a requirement, understand what is being asked, and spot gaps or risks in a vendor's quote. Night shift availability. Ready to work 5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time, Monday to Friday, without exception. Serious attention to detail. Numbers, SKUs, quantities, and dates must always be right. Discipline and work ethic. Self-driven, reliable, consistent. You do not need someone standing over you to get the work done. Confident on calls. Polite, professional, clear. No slang, no shortcuts. Hungry. You want to build something real and you are willing to put in the work to get there. Nice-to-Have Previous experience in procurement, sourcing, or supply chain. Exposure to international tenders or B2B quotation work. Experience with tender portals or sourcing platforms. Familiarity with Notion, ClickUp, Trello, or similar project management tools. Basic knowledge of IT hardware, industrial equipment, or logistics. Do Not Apply If You are looking for a 9 to 5. You cannot commit to the night shift. You need to be chased to finish work. Your English is weak and you plan to fake it on vendor calls. You cannot. Submission Guidelines Interested candidates should submit their updated CV along with a short introduction (2 to 3 paragraphs) explaining why they are a good fit for this role and confirming their availability for the night shift (5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time). Send applications to: procurement@vastglobelogistics.com Please write "Sourcing & Quotation Analyst Application" in the email subject line. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications without a proper introduction will not be considered.
